creator: alex@i.org.ua
text:
(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #1)

Checked a few versions back, it newer successful. Guessing on errors in 'make test', it's because no 'docker' executable on jailed sandbox.

Need support to understand how to disable 'make test' since hard to make compatible environment for tests? TEST_DEPENDS=docker didn't help much.

Also, there are new govmomi version released. It's ok to Close this bug, I'll drop new one. Of course, if can configure to skip testing, no sense otherwise.
